%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<style>
	a {
		/* a malformed consecutive double-dot is left verbatim (like ..5, 1.5.5, 1.px); prettier normalizes it */
		a: 1;
		b: 1e-10;
		c: 1.5;
	}
</style>
